name: Meningococcal Polysaccharide Vaccine Group W-135
description: Meningococcal group W-135 polysaccharide is group-specific polysaccharide antigens extracted and purified from *Neisseria meningitidis* serogroup W-135. *N. meningitidis* is a bacteria that causes endemic and epidemic diseases including meningitis and meningococcemia. It is subcutaneously administered as an active immunization against the invasive meningococcal disease caused by the serogroup W-135.
